title: Getting Started with Web Development
body:
A roadmap for learning web development in 2025:

  • HTML & CSS — Start with structure and styling
  • JavaScript — Learn the language of the web
  • Git & GitHub — Version control is essential
  • React or Vue — Pick a framework
  • Node.js — Backend JavaScript

Focus on building projects, not just watching tutorials.

title: Useful VS Code Extensions
body:
Must-have extensions for productivity:

  • Prettier — Code formatting
  • ESLint — Linting
  • GitLens — Git supercharged
  • Thunder Client — API testing
  • Auto Rename Tag — HTML quality of life

title: Design Resources Collection
body:
Free design resources for developers:

  • Unsplash — Free photos
  • Heroicons — SVG icons
  • Coolors — Color palette generator
  • Google Fonts — Typography
  • Figma — Free tier for design
